subject: Swellow — a streamlined blue and red bird in a diving flight pose against a pale sky
description: A sleek bird creature swoops dynamically in a diving pose. The body is blue on the upper surfaces with a red-and-white underside, featuring a forked swallow-tail silhouette. The wings are swept back in a high-speed dive configuration. The background is a pale, lightly clouded sky, giving the image an open, airy feel. The figure is viewed from a slightly below angle, emphasizing the speed and predatory grace of the dive.
foreground: Blue and red swallow-type bird in a steep diving pose
